e2_sentence: Abu-Huraira added, "The Mujahid (i.e.  Muslim fighter) is rewarded even for the footsteps of his horse while it  wanders about (for grazing) tied in a long rope.

e1_sentence: A man came to Allah's Apostle and said, "Instruct me as to such a deed as  equals Jihad (in reward).
